title: oncidium weltonii
intro: Oncidium weltonii, also known as the Welton's Oncidium, is a type of orchid native to Central and South America, belonging to the Oncidiinae subtribe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Oncidium weltonii include its potential use in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Oncidium weltonii are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
